results.rendered_html:
śāta p. p. śe-kta
1 Sharpened, whetted.
2 Thin, slender.
3
(pb) Weak, feeble.
4 Beautiful, handsome.
5 Cut down.
6 Happy, thriving.
— taḥ The Dhattūra plant.
— taṃ Happiness, pleasure, delight; māninījanajanitaśātaṃ  Gīt. 10. 
Comp.
— udarī a woman with; a slender waist;  Śi. 5. 23 ;  R. 10. 69. 
— śikha a. sharp-pointed.
